stage: pre-run lint gate (build-time, no gold answers involved)
reason: statement-form E-check expressions (try/except, import) are un-evaluable by runtime eval(); detected by lint_echecks standalone pass

repairs.old: try: datetime.strptime(inputs['grant_date'], '%Y-%m-%d'); True; except ValueError: False
repairs.new: isinstance(inputs['grant_date'], str) and len(inputs['grant_date']) == 10 and inputs['grant_date'][4] == '-' and inputs['grant_date'][7] == '-' and inputs['grant_date'][:4].isdigit() and inputs['grant_date'][5:7].isdigit() and inputs['grant_date'][8:10].isdigit()

repairs.new: isinstance(inputs['sale_date'], str) and len(inputs['sale_date']) == 10 and inputs['sale_date'][4] == '-' and inputs['sale_date'][7] == '-' and inputs['sale_date'][:4].isdigit() and inputs['sale_date'][5:7].isdigit() and inputs['sale_date'][8:10].isdigit()

repairs.old: try: import json; b = json.loads(inputs['brackets']); return isinstance(b, dict) and all(isinstance(k, (int, float, str)) and isinstance(v, (int, float)) for k,v in b.items()) and all(float(k) >= 0 for k in b.keys()) except (json.JSONDecodeError, TypeError, ValueError): return False
repairs.new: isinstance(json.loads(inputs['brackets']), dict) and all(isinstance(v, (int, float)) for v in json.loads(inputs['brackets']).values()) and all(str(k).lstrip('-').replace('.', '', 1).isdigit() and float(k) >= 0 for k in json.loads(inputs['brackets']).keys())
